name: clothing-store
description: Online Clothing Store — full-stack e-commerce (Pakistan market)

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @store/shared-types && npm run build -w @store/database
scripts.build:api: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @store/api
scripts.build:storefront: npm run build -w @store/shared-types && npm run build -w @store/storefront
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @store/api && npm run build:storefront && npm run build:admin
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run db:up && npm run build:packages && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
